metadata.description: A small, opinionated set of multi-agent plugins for Claude Code. Two single-agent bridges — codex (OpenAI Codex) and agy (Google Antigravity) — plus contexthub, the multi-agent hub that ties Claude, codex, and agy together across the software lifecycle, task triage, and the Delphi converge debate, degrading gracefully to whichever agents are installed. Deliberately lightweight by construction.

plugins.name: codex
plugins.description: OpenAI Codex CLI bridge: hard reasoning (gpt-5.5 xhigh), code review (high), Playwright browser (medium), image generation (gpt-image-2), session resume, raw exec. Structured 5-section handoff spec with audit trail on every call. Default effort is medium; the contexthub triage skill escalates per task.

plugins.name: agy
plugins.description: Google Antigravity CLI bridge: 1M-token long-context analysis (Gemini 3 Pro), Nano Banana image generation & editing (story, edit, restore, icon, pattern, diagram) via a wired MCP backend with an agy-direct fallback and explicit /agy:setup, Veo video generation, raw exec — filling capability gaps Claude Code cannot meet alone.

plugins.name: contexthub
plugins.description: The multi-agent hub for Claude Code: the full software lifecycle (spec, plan, tdd, review, verify, debug, ship), token-efficient task triage, and the four-phase Delphi converge debate. Ties Claude, OpenAI Codex, and Google Antigravity together, degrading gracefully to whichever of the three are installed.
